privacy.metaDescription: How ViaHost processes personal data in accordance with the GDPR for EEA customers and applicable data protection law.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: How we collect, process and protect your personal data. ViaHost Infrastructure LLC acts as the controller; the GDPR (EU 2016/679) applies to customers in the European Economic Area.

controller.heading: Data controller
controller.todo: Identity and contact details of the controller: LLC legal name, EIN/registration, registered address, and EU representative / DPO if applicable (GDPR art. 27 for companies outside the EU).

dataCollected.heading: Data we collect
dataCollected.todo: Data categories: account, billing, technical logs, cookies. Detail each purpose.

purpose.heading: Purpose and legal basis
purpose.todo: Processing purposes and legal basis (performance of a contract, consent, legitimate interest).

retention.heading: Data retention
retention.todo: Retention periods by category and applied criteria.

recipients.heading: Recipients and processors
recipients.todo: Third parties with access (payment providers, infrastructure) and international transfers, if any.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.todo: Access, rectification, erasure, objection, portability and restriction; how to exercise them and lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (EEA customers, with their data protection authority).

security.heading: Security
security.todo: Technical and organizational measures applied to protect the data.

terms.metaDescription: Terms of use and ordering for ViaHost services.
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Terms governing the use and ordering of the hosting, VPS, dedicated server and DDoS mitigation services.

purpose.heading: Purpose and acceptance
purpose.todo: Description of the services and acceptance of the terms upon ordering.

ordering.heading: Ordering and payment
ordering.todo: Sign-up process, payment methods, renewal, taxes and refund policy.

acceptableUse.heading: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.todo: Prohibited conduct (abuse, unlawful content, spam) and consequences of non-compliance.

sla.heading: Service levels (SLA)
sla.todo: Availability commitment, exclusions and compensation for non-compliance.

liability.heading: Liability
liability.todo: Limitation of liability and applicable exclusions.

termination.heading: Suspension and termination
termination.todo: Grounds and procedure for suspension or termination of the service by either party.

law.heading: Governing law and jurisdiction
law.todo: Applicable law and competent jurisdiction for dispute resolution.

cookies.metaDescription: Which cookies ViaHost uses and how to manage them.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Information about the cookies and similar technologies used by this website and how you can manage them.

what.heading: What cookies are
what.todo: Definition and general explanation of cookies and their purpose.

used.heading: Cookies we use
used.todo: Table for each cookie: name, type (technical, analytics, etc.), purpose, duration and provider. The site currently does NOT load analytics; fill in when added.

consent.heading: Legal basis and consent
consent.todo: How consent is obtained for non-essential cookies (banner) and how to withdraw it.

managing.heading: Managing cookies
managing.todo: Instructions for configuring or deleting cookies in the main browsers.

changes.heading: Changes to the policy
changes.todo: How future updates to this policy will be communicated.
